reference_conditions.note: FitClick calculator defaults. exercise_calories.csv stores cal_per_hr_150lb (value shown at 150 lbs for 1 hour) and cal_15min_150lb (the default 15-min display).

scaling.verified: FitClick output is linear in body weight and duration (tested 75/150/300 lbs and 15/30/60 min: Crunches showed 51 cal @150lb/15min, 102 @300lb/15min, 204 @150lb/60min, 51 @75lb/30min).

met_equivalent.note: 71.4 = 3.5 * 68.04 kg / 200 * 60; using met_estimate with the standard MET formula reproduces FitClick's numbers for any weight/duration.

scaling.example: Squat (cal_per_hr_150lb=442) for a 180 lb user, 20 min: 442 * (180/150) * (20/60) = 177 calories

fallbacks.fitclick_match: Direct match to a FitClick exercise (exact/fuzzy/manual). 522 of 1164 exercises, 86% of all workout exercise slots.
fallbacks.category_estimate: No FitClick match; median cal/hr of FitClick-created exercises in the inferred body-part category.
fallbacks.strength_median_estimate: No category inferable; overall median of FitClick strength (non-cardio) exercises (408 cal/hr @150lb).
